fields.label: Deploy Key
fields.helpText: From Convex Dashboard -> Settings -> Deploy Key

healthcheck_config.description: Validates Convex deployment URL is reachable

metadata.summary: Convex real-time backend-as-a-service with document database, serverless functions, and scheduling.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Open your Convex Dashboard at dashboard.convex.dev
2. Select your project and go to Settings
3. Copy the Deployment URL (e.g. https://your-app-123.convex.cloud)
4. Generate or copy the Deploy Key (starts with prod:...)
5. Paste both values here

Note: Table listing requires the Professional plan. On the free Starter plan, use the Console to call your query functions directly.
